title: Bonza Double Cat Bowls Feeding Station, 400ml Premium Stainless Steel Dog and Cat Food or Water Bowls with Non-Spill Silicone Base, for Small Dogs and Cats
features: TWO CAN SHARE or a full dinner set with food and water for one. Includes two premium 400ml stainless steel dog bowls, each measuring 14cm diameter x 4cm height.

NO MORE MESS with the silicone base featuring a raised outer lip to contain spills. The soft flexible silicone won’t scratch your floors either. Just be careful to remove the dog or cat bowls before picking up.
KEEPS YOUR BOWLS FROM SLIDING as the silicone base is non-slip on most floors. Watching your dog or cat chase their bowl around the floor is a thing of the past.
SAVE YOURSELF MORE TIME and simply pop everything in the dishwasher. Your feeding station is 100% dishwasher safe. Bowls and base can be easily rinsed and cleaned under the tap too.

LOOKS GREAT in any home or apartment with its attractive and compact design, Feel good knowing your floor and your most importantly your pets are safe too. All our products are food safe and 100% BPA free.
description: Product Description Essentials for Cats and Small Dogs ____________________________ Looking for an easy solution to your pet’s messy eating or drinking habits? Introducing a smart feeding station both you and your pets will love. A full dinner set of food and water for one, or two pets can share. Its practical stadium shaped base means it can sit flush against a wall and takes up minimal space in your feeding area. Perfect for apartments and small spaces. The flexible base and bowls are easily packable for travel too. Contain Spills and Prevent Messes Stop reaching for the broom or mop every time your pet finishes their meals. Designed to contain spills and prevent messes, the Bonza food and water bowls help to keep your floor looking and staying clean. The high-grade silicone base featuring a raised outer lip captures spills on all sides, while it's compact design keeps your feeding area looking neat and tidy. Flexible High-Grade Silicone Base Two holders keep your bowls firmly in place during feeding, and the high-grade silicone is naturally non-slip. Should your furry companion manage to pull and drag it around, your floor is safe from scratches. Convenient for travel too. Simply roll or fold up and pack away to take with you. High-Quality Stainless-Steel Bowls Sturdy and lightweight high-quality stainless-steel bowls that will not rust. Built to stand the test of time. Each bowl holds 400 ml of food or water. Perfect for small dogs, cats, and other pets up to 12 kg. Spare bowls available to purchase, so you can always have clean bowls at hand. 100% Dishwasher Safe Easy to just pop everything into the dishwasher for a sparkling clean. The bowls and silicone base are 100% dishwasher safe. You can rinse and clean under the tap using warm soapy water too. FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS Q: Can I purchase replacement bowls separately? A: Yes, Bonza replacement bowls are available. Q: What size are the bowls? A: 14cm top diameter, including the lip x 9cm bottom diameter x 4cm height. The top diameter excluding the lip is 13.25cm. 400ml capacity for each bowl. Q: Are the stainless-steel bowls and the silicone base 100% dishwasher safe? A: Yes, everything is completely safe for the dishwasher. Q: My cat "flips" his bowl over. Does the base hold the dishes securely to prevent this? A: Yes, the bowls sit deep in the base and the rims of both bowls sit flush on the base. Designed to be easy for you to remove but not for your pet. Q: Is the base skid-proof? A: The base is made from soft silicone rubber and is designed to stay in one place while feeding. If strong enough, your pet may still drag it around, flip it over or chew on it. All pets are different and we recommended deciding first if this product is going to be right for your pet. Q: Is this BPA free and food-grade silicone? A: Yes, the silicone is food-grade and 100% BPA free. Q: Is the silicone base odourless? A: Yes, there may be some initial odour from manufacturing and handling. We highly recommend washing before the first use. ABOUT BONZA Bonza’s goal is to make life easier for pet owners everywhere. Simplify your lifestyle so you can spend more time enjoying your cat or dog, and less time cleaning up after them. We will only ever provide you with superior manufacturing and use the best materials possible for all Bonza products.
